metadata.title: Local LLM Deployment & Inference Optimization Resources
metadata.description: High-signal sites and repos for advanced local LLM deployment and inference optimization

awesome_lists.description: Core aggregation repos with breadth and links to deeper literature

resources.name: Awesome-LLM-Inference
resources.description: Curated list focused specifically on inference: FlashAttention, paged attention, quantization schemes (INT8/4), parallelism, etc.

resources.name: Awesome-LLM-Inference-Engine
resources.description: Catalog of inference engines, serving architectures, and system-level optimization techniques

resources.name: Awesome-LLM
resources.description: Broader LLM list, includes sections for inference optimizations (MInference, ExLlama, etc.)

resources.name: 10 GitHub Repos AI Engineers Use to Make LLMs Faster and Cheaper
resources.description: Opinionated stack with pointers to llama.cpp, vLLM, FlashAttention, MLC-LLM, Unsloth, etc., plus commentary on where each fits in a deployment pipeline

engines_and_frameworks.description: Engines and frameworks with strong documentation for deployment

resources.name: llama.cpp
resources.description: Canonical reference for CPU/GPU-lean local inference, quantization formats (Q4_0, Q5_K_M, etc.), KV-cache strategies, GPU offload profiles

resources.name: vLLM
resources.description: Excellent docs on paged attention, continuous batching, memory management, and throughput/latency tradeoffs

resources.name: Text Generation Inference (TGI)
resources.description: Hugging Face's serving stack; docs cover max tokens, batching, parallelism knobs, and OOM avoidance

resources.name: MLC LLM
resources.description: Compilation-based local inference across GPUs/CPUs/mobile; good for understanding cross-platform kernel-level optimizations

resources.name: ExLlama / ExLlamaV2
resources.description: Highly optimized LLaMA-family inference for GPUs with quantized weights; great for reading effective CUDA-level tricks for local serving

resources.name: MInference
resources.description: Focused on long-context sparse attention for faster prefill on A100-class GPUs, but concepts generalize

resources.name: ktransformers
resources.description: Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations with KV-cache support

resources.name: TensorRT-LLM
resources.description: NVIDIA's high-performance LLM inference engine with Python API and SOTA optimizations for NVIDIA GPUs

resources.name: PowerInfer
resources.description: High-speed Large Language Model Serving for Local Deployment optimized for consumer GPUs

resources.name: Ollama
resources.description: One-command local deployment for Llama, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models

resources.name: Intel IPEX-LLM
resources.description: Accelerate local LLM inference on Intel XPU (Arc, Flex, Max) with seamless HuggingFace/LangChain integration

resources.name: LM Studio
resources.description: Discover, download, and run local LLMs with user-friendly GUI and GGUF support

resources.name: PowerServe
resources.description: High-speed and easy-use LLM serving framework for local deployment

quantization.description: Quantization tools and techniques for LLM inference optimization

resources.name: AutoGPTQ
resources.description: Easy-to-use LLMs quantization package with user-friendly APIs based on GPTQ algorithm

resources.name: RWKV.cpp
resources.description: INT4/INT5/INT8 and FP16 inference on CPU for RWKV language models

resources.name: exllamav3
resources.description: Optimized quantization and inference library for running LLMs on modern consumer GPUs

resources.name: NVIDIA Model-Optimizer
resources.description: Unified library of SOTA model optimization techniques: quantization, pruning, distillation, speculative decoding

resources.name: OpenVINO NNCF
resources.description: Neural Network Compression Framework for enhanced OpenVINO inference with PTQ and QAT

optimization.description: Advanced optimization techniques for inference acceleration

resources.name: KVA (Vast Undivided Attention)
resources.description: Global KVCache storage solution optimizing TTFT and GPU utilization

resources.name: Marlin
resources.description: FP16xINT4 LLM inference kernel with near-ideal ~4x speedups for medium batch sizes

resources.name: SpargeAttention
resources.description: Training-free sparse attention that accelerates any model in inference

resources.name: TinyChatEngine
resources.description: On-Device LLM Inference Library for mobile/edge deployment

resources.name: Decoding Attention
resources.description: CUDA-optimized attention for MHA, MQA, GQA and MLA in LLM inference decoding stage

resources.name: LoRAX
resources.description: Multi-LoRA inference server that scales to 1000s of fine-tuned LLMs

local_apps.description: End-user applications for local LLM deployment

resources.name: h2oGPT
resources.description: Private chat with local GPT with documents, images, video - 100% private, Apache 2.0

resources.name: Local-LLM-Comparison-Colab-UI
resources.description: Compare performance of different LLMs on consumer hardware via Colab

vendor_best_practices.description: Cloud vendor best practices - system-level techniques applicable locally

resources.name: Google Cloud - Best practices for optimizing LLM inference
resources.description: Detailed guide on quantization, tensor parallelism, paged/flash attention, and tuning serving parameters (batching, max tokens) using vLLM and TGI

resources.name: AWS - Running and optimizing SLMs on-premises/edge
resources.description: Covers deployment topologies, hardware selection, and runtime tuning for small/local models

resources.name: Latitude - Ultimate Guide to LLM Inference Optimization
resources.description: Recent high-level but practical overview of speed, cost, and GPU efficiency levers

local_guides.description: Local LLM-specific guides and blogs - VRAM budgets, consumer GPUs, desktop/server setups

resources.name: Intuition Labs - Local LLM Deployment on 24GB GPUs
resources.description: Deep dive into models, VRAM budgets, quantization, and configuration for 24 GB-class consumer GPUs

resources.name: LocalLLM.in - How to Run a Local LLM (2025)
resources.description: Covers cost-performance tradeoffs, quantization, context length tuning, CPU–GPU offloading, and common bottlenecks

resources.name: Cognativ - Essential Guide to Setting Up Your Local LLM for Optimal Performance
resources.description: Discusses deployment topologies (local machine vs local server), model selection, and perf tuning recommendations

resources.name: Kairntech - LLM On-Premise: Deploy AI Locally with Full Control
resources.description: On-prem patterns, operational challenges, and performance considerations for local deployments

community_hubs.description: Community hubs and real-world config threads - empirical configs for fringe hardware

resources.name: r/LocalLLaMA
resources.description: Ongoing threads on 'how companies deploy LLMs,' optimization tips, and hands-on inference tuning discussions

resources.name: No-BS LLM deployment database
resources.description: Community-maintained examples of actual deployment stacks, including local setups

resources.name: LinkedIn - Deep Dive into Local Deployment and Performance Optimization
resources.description: Walks through benchmarking methodology and best practices for balancing latency vs GPU utilization for local chatbots

benchmarking.description: LLM benchmarking tools, catalogs, and evaluation frameworks

resources.name: Evidently AI LLM Benchmark Catalog
resources.description: Catalog of ~30 LLM benchmarks with taxonomy

resources.name: Deepchecks LLM Evaluation Tools
resources.description: Best 10 LLM Evaluation Tools in 2025

resources.name: BerriAI LLM Benchmark GitHub
resources.description: Curated GitHub list of LLM benchmarks

resources.name: Symflower LLM Benchmarks Overview
resources.description: Overview of popular LLM benchmarks

resources.name: Galileo AI Benchmark Categories
resources.description: Taxonomy by task type and benchmark families

resources.name: Lamatic 25 Best LLM Benchmarks
resources.description: Long-form list of 25 best LLM benchmarks

resources.name: Vellum LLM Leaderboard
resources.description: Normalized benchmark score table across models

resources.name: Reddit LocalLLaMA Benchmarking Tools
resources.description: Infra-oriented benchmarking tools discussion

mlops_observability.description: MLOps tools and observability platforms for LLM production

resources.name: lakeFS MLOps Tools 2026
resources.description: Covers experiment tracking, feature stores, CI/CD, model monitoring

resources.name: Coaxsoft MLOps Methods and Tools
resources.description: Detailed guide on MLOps methods and tools

resources.name: Anaconda MLOps Tools Guide
resources.description: 2025 Buyer's Guide with observability section

resources.name: Grid Dynamics ML Observability AWS
resources.description: ML observability features in AWS

distributed_training.description: Distributed training resources for large-scale LLM training

resources.name: Kindatechnical Distributed Training Case Study
resources.description: Practical architecture for multi-GPU/multi-node

resources.name: ODSC PyTorch Ray Distributed Training
resources.description: Distributed training with PyTorch Distributed and Ray

resources.name: Secure Distributed Training at Scale
resources.description: Paper on All-Reduce, Byzantine tolerance

video_generation.description: AI video generation models and tools

resources.name: ComfyUI
resources.description: GUI for running Stable Diffusion and AI generation models - modular workflow system

resources.name: ComfyUI-Manager
resources.description: Manager for ComfyUI to install and update custom nodes

resources.name: LTX-Video
resources.description: LTX 2.3 video generation model - high-quality video synthesis from images/text

resources.name: Stable Video Diffusion
resources.description: Open-source video generation model for latent consistency

resources.name: ZeroScope
resources.description: Open-weight video generation model optimized for consumer GPUs

resources.name: ModelScope
resources.description: Alibaba's text-to-video generation framework

resources.name: AnimateDiff
resources.description: Tool for animating Stable Diffusion models to generate videos

resources.name: Deforum
resources.description: AI art generation tool with video animation capabilities

resources.name: RTX 5090 Video Benchmarks
resources.description: Video generation performance benchmarks on RTX 5090

resources.name: RTX 5090 AI Video Performance
resources.description: Analysis of RTX 5090 for AI video generation workloads

audio_generation.description: AI audio and music generation models

resources.name: AudioGen
resources.description: Facebook's audio generation model for sound effects

resources.name: MusicGen
resources.description: Facebook's music generation model based on transformers

resources.name: Riffusion
resources.description: Real-time music generation from Stable Diffusion

resources.name: EnCodec
resources.description: Meta's high-fidelity audio codec and generation

resources.name: Voicebox
resources.description: Meta's text-to-speech and audio generation model

resources.name: Bark
resources.description: Open-source text-to-speech and audio generation

resources.name: ElevenLabs
resources.description: High-quality voice cloning and text-to-speech API

resources.name: XTTS
resources.description: Coqui's multilingual text-to-speech model
